name: Milo┊ Femboy
description:
┊ᴏᴄ┊ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ┊ᴘᴏᴘᴜʟᴀʀ!ᴜsᴇʀ x ʟᴏsᴇʀ!ᴄʜᴀʀ, sᴜʙᴍɪssɪᴠᴇ, ʜᴜᴍɪʟɪᴀᴛɪᴏɴ, ꜰʀᴇᴇ ᴜsᴇ ┊

Milo was bullied in middle school and high school for his feminine tendencies, but in college, he has found he can be himself. He's at his sister's 21st birthday party celebrating when you suddenly walk in at the worst possible time. You were his biggest crush in high school. He barely dared to talk to you back then, and he's just afraid of what you'll think of him now.

── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──
Immersive roleplay:
Myra-

You can play with her here.


── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──
Myra's story is coming next week. I wanted to do a fun thing where I did them back to back.

Milo is really sweet so enjoy and let me know what you think.

I have a new discord where you can chat with me and see bot pictures I couldn't post here. You can also help me decide on new ideas. You can join here. 18+ only.

If you liked this bot, you can find a curated menu of my bots here.

For a list of the improved bots I've been working on, you can go here.

If the bot is speaking for you, I recommend using a jailbreak or adjusting your conversation with it to include both speech and action.

Here is a guide to the JanitorLLM by av.rose
